title: arctium minus subsp. nemorosum
intro: Arctium minus subsp. nemorosum, also known as woodland burdock, is a subspecies of the burdock plant, characterized by its dense, woolly hairs and edible roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Arctium minus subsp. nemorosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and promote healthy skin. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
